title: Search functionality - Positive flow
preconditions: The app is open and on the 'Teams' screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Teams' screen. | Click on the search bar. | Type 'Barcelona' into the search bar. | Press the 'Enter' key to perform the search.
expected_result: The search results should display 'Barcelona' and other related teams.

title: Search functionality - Negative flow
preconditions: The app is open and on the 'Teams' screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Teams' screen. | Click on the search bar. | Type 'Non-existent team name' into the search bar. | Press the 'Enter' key to perform the search.
expected_result: The search results should not display any teams.

title: Segmented control - Positive flow
preconditions: The app is open and on the 'Teams' screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Teams' screen. | Click on the segmented control. | Select the 'United' option.
expected_result: The screen should display a list of popular sports teams from the United region.

title: Segmented control - Negative flow
preconditions: The app is open and on the 'Teams' screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Teams' screen. | Click on the segmented control. | Select a non-existent region.
expected_result: The segmented control should not allow selection of a non-existent region.

title: Input field - Positive flow
preconditions: The app is open and on the 'Teams' screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Teams' screen. | Click on the search bar. | Type 'Barcelona' into the search bar. | Press the 'Enter' key to perform the search.
expected_result: The search results should display 'Barcelona' and other related teams.

title: Input field - Negative flow
preconditions: The app is open and on the 'Teams' screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Teams' screen. | Click on the search bar. | Type 'Non-existent team name' into the search bar. | Press the 'Enter' key to perform the search.

title: Navigation - Positive flow
preconditions: The app is open and on the 'Teams' screen.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Teams' screen. | Click on the search bar. | Type 'Barcelona' into the search bar. | Press the 'Enter' key to perform the search. | Click on 'Barcelona' in the search results.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the 'Barcelona' team details screen.
